title: Platform Settings
page_subtitle: Manage your profile and personalize your experience

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.name: Display Name
profile.ad_notice: Your profile is managed by your organization's Active Directory. Contact your IT administrator to update your information.

appearance.title: Theme
appearance.description: Choose how RiskHub looks to you.
appearance.theme_light_desc: Clean and bright for daytime use
appearance.theme_dark_desc: True dark mode for OLED displays
appearance.persistence_note: Theme preference is saved locally on this device and will persist across sessions.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.subtitle: Choose which notifications you want to receive
notifications.approval_pending_desc: When a new request needs your approval
notifications.approval_resolved_desc: When your requests are approved or rejected
notifications.approval_cancelled_desc: When an approval request is cancelled
notifications.kri_due_tomorrow_desc: When KRI reporting is due tomorrow
notifications.kri_near_breach_desc: When KRI values approach threshold limits
notifications.questionnaire_sent_desc: When a risk assessment questionnaire is sent to you
notifications.questionnaire_due_soon_desc: Reminder when your questionnaire is due in 7 days
notifications.questionnaire_overdue_desc: When your questionnaire is past its due date
notifications.questionnaire_submitted_desc: When a risk assessment questionnaire is submitted
notifications.questionnaire_clarification_requested_de: When someone requests clarification on your questionnaire responses
notifications.vendor_assessment_submitted_desc: When a vendor assessment is submitted for review
notifications.vendor_assessment_committee_recommended_: When an assessment reaches committee recommendation
notifications.vendor_assessment_decided_desc: When a final decision is recorded for a vendor assessment
notifications.vendor_reassessment_due_soon_desc: Reminder when a vendor reassessment is coming up
notifications.vendor_reassessment_overdue_desc: When a vendor reassessment is overdue
notifications.vendor_sla_due_tomorrow_desc: When an SLA deadline is due tomorrow
notifications.vendor_sla_overdue_desc: When an SLA deadline is overdue
notifications.vendor_sla_near_breach_desc: When SLA performance is close to breaching
notifications.vendor_sla_breach_detected_desc: When an SLA breach is detected
notifications.persistence_note: Your preferences are saved automatically and synced across devices.

localization.title: Localization Settings
localization.language_description: Select your preferred language for the RiskHub interface.
localization.coming_soon_message: Full language translation is currently in development. Your preference will be saved and applied automatically once translations are available.

documentation.title: Documentation & Help
documentation.subtitle: Access guides and documentation tailored to your role ({{role}}).
documentation.empty_subtitle: Documentation will be available in future updates.
documentation.version_info: RiskHub v1.0 • Documentation will be expanded in future updates
